tagline: Building scalable AI systems and cloud-powered intelligent solutions.
bio: Results-driven AI/ML Engineering student with hands-on experience designing and deploying machine learning systems, cloud-based automation tools, and intelligent applications. Proficient in Python, deep learning frameworks, and AWS cloud services. Demonstrated ability to solve real-world problems through LSTM-based time-series modelling, cloud resource optimisation, and adaptive AI systems.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology — Computer Science & Engineering
education.institution: Modern Institute of Technology and Research Centre (MITRC)

projects.title: AI Resource Optimization Platform
projects.summary: Engineered an end-to-end predictive system that monitors real-time CPU usage and battery consumption, forecasting resource utilization using an LSTM model. Includes an AI recommendation engine that dynamically suggests performance optimizations, reducing simulated resource overhead by 30%.

projects.title: Ghost-Audit: AWS Resource Analyser
projects.summary: Developed a cloud intelligence tool that automatically detects idle and underutilized AWS resources (EC2, S3, RDS) using the boto3 SDK, helping reduce unnecessary cloud spend. Designed automated n8n workflows for scheduled audits and alert notifications, and integrated DVC for reproducible experiment tracking.

projects.title: Adaptive AI MCQ Testing System
projects.summary: Architected an AI-driven assessment platform that dynamically adjusts question difficulty in real time based on individual student performance metrics. Implemented an adaptive algorithm using Item Response Theory (IRT) principles, improving assessment accuracy and personalization.

blog.title: Deploying Machine Learning at the Edge: Memory vs Latency
blog.excerpt: Analyzing optimization techniques for deep learning models when resource constraints are severe. A look into LSTM quantization and pruning.

blog.title: Building a Zero-Cost AWS Audit Tool with Python and n8n
blog.excerpt: A step-by-step guide to tracking idle instances, orphaned volumes, and hidden cost leaks using the boto3 SDK and lightweight automation.

blog.title: Understanding Item Response Theory in Adaptive Learning Systems
blog.excerpt: Why traditional static tests are failing students and how we can use probability models to gauge true learner competency dynamically.
